summary: Compiler support for mixed precision fused kernels
description: Several model architectures we now serve want mixed precision, some layers in a lower precision than others, but the fusion pass only supports fusing ops that share a single uniform precision today.

comments.author: Jonah Kim
comments.body: This is a meaningful scheduler change, fusion boundaries need to become precision-aware rather than assuming uniform precision within a fused group. Scoping now, will not be quick.

comments.author: Maya Okafor
comments.body: any update on timeline, this is blocking a couple of model launches

comments.author: Jonah Kim
comments.body: Landed precision-aware fusion boundaries, verified against the two blocked model architectures with matching numerics to an unfused reference run. No changes needed on the serving side, this is entirely within the compiler. Resolving.
